judgeReasoning: The response satisfies all three required rubric points: it explains that `group` organizes navigation, llms.txt sections, search metadata, and AGENTS.md grouping; it correctly characterizes /llms-full.txt as a single monolithic all-docs file not split per group; and it names many valid optional fields (icon, deprecated, experimental, canary, new, draft, tags, full, lastModified, lastAuthor).
